statement.informal: `mppt_step` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (V_MIN <= voltage_now ∧ voltage_now <= V_MAX ∧ POWER_MIN <= power_now ∧ power_now <= POWER_MAX ∧ POWER_MIN <= power_prev ∧ power_prev <= POWER_MAX), the function's result satisfies (V_MIN <= result ∧ result <= V_MAX). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
statement.formal_lean:
-- @verify obligation pulled from mppt.eml
-- theorem mppt_voltage_command_safe : ∀ args, (V_MIN <= voltage_now ∧ voltage_now <= V_MAX ∧ POWER_MIN <= power_now ∧ power_now <= POWER_MAX ∧ POWER_MIN <= power_prev ∧ power_prev <= POWER_MAX) → (V_MIN <= result ∧ result <= V_MAX) := sorry
